scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/commands && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/renderer-reveal
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/commands && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/renderer-reveal
scripts.build:schema: npm run build:schema --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run build:schema --workspace @pagestate/commands
